title: Skild 从 Zebra 收购 Fetch Robotics 资产
summary: Skild AI acquires Zebra Technologies’ robotics arm to deploy its hardware-agnostic "brain" and automate end-to-end warehouse fulfillment. The post Skild acquires Fetch Robotics assets from Zebra appeared first on The Robot Report .（原题：Skild acquires Fetch Robotics assets from Zebra）

title: Nvidia 校友乘中国机器人浪潮首次亮相，估值达 1.5 亿美元
summary: Manycore Tech Inc. built a billion-dollar valuation in China’s once-sizzling real estate market. Now, the software unicorn is betting on robotics and AI for its second act.（原题：Nvidia Alum Rides China’s Robotics Wave to $150 Million Debut）

title: AGIBOT在电子制造中部署半人形机器人
summary: Longcheer has integrated multiple AGIBOT G2 robots into its tablet production lines, and plans to deploy 100 by Q3 2026. The post AGIBOT deploys semi-humanoid robots in electronics manufacturing appeared first on The Robot Report .（原题：AGIBOT deploys semi-humanoid robots in electronics manufacturing）
